title: These Mossel Bay bowls teams mean business
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Bowls Club...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Bowls Club recently wrapped up and announced the winners of its biannual business league.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Bowls Club recently wrapped up and announced the winners of its biannual business league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The league runs for six consecutive Thursday evenings and is played on a strength-to-strength basis, during which stronger teams play one another, giving newer players a chance at winning a game or two.","html":"The league runs for six consecutive Thursday evenings and is played on a strength-to-strength basis, during which stronger teams play one another, giving newer players a chance at winning a game or two."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Twenty-eight teams of four players each participated and represented local businesses in the Mossel Bay area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Great fun is had and local businesses are able to interact in a social environment,\" said the club.","html":"\"Great fun is had and local businesses are able to interact in a social environment,\" said the club."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The team from Moss Ink, Marinus and Jerry van der Mescht, Leon van Rensburg and Piet Snyders, took first place.","html":"The team from Moss Ink, Marinus and Jerry van der Mescht, Leon van Rensburg and Piet Snyders, took first place."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gabriel Smith, Gerald Glover, Ricus Serfontein and Marius Harmse took second place for team On Cloud.","html":"Gabriel Smith, Gerald Glover, Ricus Serfontein and Marius Harmse took second place for team On Cloud."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In third place was team Drema, Hennie le Roux, André le Roux, Candice White and Piet Pienaar.","html":"In third place was team Drema, Hennie le Roux, André le Roux, Candice White and Piet Pienaar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Plate (the second half of the ladder where newer players compete) was won by team Rickert Terblanche.","html":"The Plate (the second half of the ladder where newer players compete) was won by team Rickert Terblanche."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team On Cloud’s Gabriel Smith, Gerald Glover, Ricus Serfontein, Willie Harmse and Marius Harmse with club president Tekkie van Rensburg.","html":"Team On Cloud’s Gabriel Smith, Gerald Glover, Ricus Serfontein, Willie Harmse and Marius Harmse with club president Tekkie van Rensburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Team Drema’s Hennie le Roux, Andre le Roux, Candice White and Piet Pienaar with club president Tekkie van Rensburg.","html":"Team Drema’s Hennie le Roux, Andre le Roux, Candice White and Piet Pienaar with club president Tekkie van Rensburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
